name: Akamine Satsuki | Stockholm Syndrome?

Message: I seriously need a break sorry guys, and i still haven't forgotten the request y'all typed in the request bot i privated. I'll make them soon promise, i can't promise they're gonna be good but i can promise that I'll do it someday.
